#  Search for and Filter Drawings 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * The search function respects any selected filter parameters and will only search for items within the filtered results.
    * The Drawings tool remembers up to five of your last searches. The list of recent search terms appears when you click into the Search bar.   
_Note_ : Click 'x' if you want to remove a recent search term from the list.
    * If you want to search for text that appears within drawings, see [Search Text Within Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/search-text-within-drawings).


##  Steps 
  * Search for Drawings
  * Filter Drawings
  * Sort Drawing Sets


#### Search for Drawings
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Enter a "number" or "title" in the search bar. 
  3. Click **Search**.
  4. To clear the search, click the 'x' in the search bar.


#### Filter Drawings
  1. Click the **Add Filter** drop-down menu.
  2. Select the filter you want to apply. The following filters are available:
     * **Discipline**
     * **Set**
     * **Status**


Note: If custom fields have been added for the project's Drawings tool, you can filter by fields of the following type: Single Select, Multi Select, and Checkbox. See [Create New Custom Fields](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/admin-company/tutorials/create-new-custom-fields).
#### Sort Drawing Sets
  1. Click **Drawing Sets**.  
_Note_ : Make sure the **List**![Icon View List](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5a3e6fbaa2ce90dd3d94ac0bf4655a0c/c06d5d23e7d592e2f2ece5ef37c401e9/icon-view-list.png?fm=webp&h=17) view is selected.
  2. Click one of the following column titles to sort by that parameter:
     * Name
     * Set Date
     * Published
     * Unpublished


## See Also
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [View Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-drawings)
  * [Search Text Within Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/search-text-within-drawings)
title: Search for and Filter Drawings
description: How to search for and filter drawings in the project's Drawings log.
